SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARNEIRO DA SILVA JR, LUIZ GUSTAVO $1,524.23 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,624.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
